summary: Adjusted the chapter's seam construction with minimal changes by shifting the opening away from the repeated slider-watch handoff from chapter 16 and ending on Paul's deadline-driven resolve so the lead-in to chapter 18 turns on the six o'clock ultimatum.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence to start from Tommy's position on the deck instead of replaying Paul watching him through the slider.
Changed the final beat to center Paul waiting on the clock, which distinguishes the close from chapter 16's similar deck-and-house tableau and sharpens the handoff into chapter 18.
